commands.description: List the crontab entries for a specific user (requires root/sudo privileges).
Prevents cron job overlap by using a file lock; ensures the next instance doesn't start if the previous one is still running.
Search system logs to verify if a cron job was triggered and check for execution errors.
Compare current crontab with a backup file to identify recent changes or accidental deletions.
Redirect stderr to stdout and pipe to syslog, allowing custom tagging of cron output for easier log filtering.
